title: Volkswagen Dieselgate
storyIntro: You are the chief PR officer. The EPA has just issued a notice of violation: the company has been using a 'defeat device' software to cheat emissions tests on 11 million diesel cars. The deception was intentional and institutional.
brief: Regulators have extracted defeat-device code designed to cheat clean diesel EPA emissions tests. Volkswagen faces catastrophic criminal fraud charges and executive purges.

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: The CEO has to go. We need a statement that admits fault without destroying us in court.

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: We cannot deny this. The EPA has the code. We must cooperate.

wrongActions: Blame a few rogue engineers immediately
winCondition: Company admits fault, leadership changes, and rebuilding begins.
loseCondition: Cover-up attempt leads to larger criminal indictments.

expected_actions: Issue an official press release admitting fault
Communicate with regulators to schedule a joint statement
Prepare executive leadership for public testimony
Initiate a global recall and fix program

winning_actions: issue_press_release --message 'We admit fault and are taking full responsibility.'
critical_actions: issue_press_release --message 'We are fully cooperating with authorities.'

detection.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager insists on immediate containment and gathering facts from legal counsel.

investigation.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager pushes for transparency but warns against admitting too much too soon.

escalation.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager demands swift action, including potential executive suspensions.

mitigation.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager focuses on rebuilding trust and minimizing long-term damage.

recovery.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager emphasizes compliance and future-proofing corporate integrity.

evolving_logs: [CRITICAL] Class action lawsuits filed in multiple countries
[ERROR] Stock price drops another 15% after CEO resignation
[WARNING] Consumer trust index hits all-time low
[ALERT] Government bans VW diesel sales in key markets
mitigation_path: issue_press_release --message 'We accept full responsibility and are cooperating fully with authorities'

incorrect_action_consequences.deny_intentional_cheating --statement 'T: Regulators release internal emails proving willful deception, triggering criminal charges.
incorrect_action_consequences.fire_whistleblowers --names 'Compliance_: Mass resignations in compliance department, triggering SEC investigation.

Manager.communication: Demands immediate action but warns against legal exposure

CTO.communication: Attempts to explain technical nuances but avoids responsibility

scenario_specific_outputs.get_regulator_status:
EPA: Active investigation
EU: Ban enacted
China: Review pending
